narrative:
Mariemont A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,432 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
